text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Yasuda Kinen is here. Sakura Chiyono O and
I have been training as hard as we possibly can
without overstraining her body.
choice_data_list: All we can do now is...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
All right, that's everything. I've checked my cleats
too.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: But maybe I should double-check them...
choice_data_list: Want to look over them together?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Uh, um...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: If you're offering, then... Yes, please.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Phew! Thanks for doing that for me.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Now my clothes and my cleats are all ready! I
slept like a log last night too!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I've got nothing to worry about! I'm going to go
out there and win this G1 race!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Of course I am!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
This is my chance to show how much I've
improved from all my training.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I just know I'm still in the middle of my growth
period!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't matter whether or not I'm at my peak.
I'm going to show everyone how far I've come!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
It's time for the Yasuda Kinen! The fastest
Umamusume have gathered here to duke it out in
this 1,600-meter race!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: You can do it, Bamboo!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Wait a second, isn't that Super Creek? Why's she
cheering for Bamboo Memory?

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you didn't know? They're actually pretty
close.

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, Super Creek was the one who
encouraged Bamboo to run on turf.

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Creek told her she'd be just as good out here,
and she was right. So here we are now!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Wow, that's really something. If an incredible
racer like Creek is cheering her on, that must
mean Bamboo Memory's pretty solid too!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehe. That's right.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Bamboo is quite powerful. ♪
